title: Five Novels of the 1960s and 70s (Library of America)
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: The second Library of America volume dedicated to Dick, collecting five novels from his most productive period: likely including Martian Time-Slip, Dr. Bloodmoney, Now Wait for Last Year, Flow My Tears the Policeman Said, and A Scanner Darkly. Dick's inclusion in the Library of America represents his canonical status in American literature.

assets.path: PaulPKDarchive/PKDpdf/Dick, Philip K - Five Novels of the 1960s and 70s (2008, Library of America) - libgen.li.epub
